filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω i
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 hω) i
  have h_bot : ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω := (bot_le : (⊥ : WithTop ι) ≤ i).trans_lt hn
  have h_rc := hX.stoppedProcess n ω i
  simp only [stoppedProcess, h_bot, Set.indicator_of_mem, Set.mem_setOf_eq, ↓reduceIte] at h_rc
  have h_eq : (fun j ↦ X (j ⊓ hX.localSeq n ω) ω) =ᶠ[𝓝 i] (fun j ↦ X j ω) :=
    (continuous_withTop_coe.tendsto i).eventually (lt_mem_nhds hn) |>.mono fun j hj ↦
      by rw [WithTop.inf_eq_left.mpr hj.le]
  exact h_eq.self_of_nhds ▸ h_rc.congr' (h_eq.filter_mono nhdsWithin_le_nhds)

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  intro t
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ : ∃ n, t < hX.localSeq n ω := (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff _).1 hω t
  exact (hX.stoppedProcess n ω t).congr_nhds (eventually_of_mem (mem_nhdsWithin_of_mem (Iio_mem_nhds hn)) fun t' ht' ↦ by
    simp [stoppedProcess, bot_le.trans_lt hn, min_eq_left ht'.le])

end cadlag

obtain ⟨τ, hτ, hY⟩ := hX
  filter_upwards [hτ.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  intro i
  obtain ⟨n, hn_n⟩ := (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 hω) i
  have hn : i < τ n ω := hn_n n le_rfl
  have h_lt : ⊥ < τ n ω := bot_le.trans_lt hn
  have h_nhds : {j | (j : WithTop ι) < τ n ω} ∈ 𝓝 i := by
    cases hτn : τ n ω with
    | top => exact Filter.univ_mem
    | some t => exact Iio_mem_nhds (WithTop.coe_lt_coe.1 (hτn ▸ hn))
  exact (hY n ω i).congr' (eventually_nhdsWithin_of_mem h_nhds fun j hj ↦ by
    simp [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le hj.le, Set.indicator_of_mem h_lt])

    have h_ev : ∀ᶠ t in 𝓝 t₀, (t : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq n ω := (WithTop.tendsto_coe t₀).eventually (lt_mem_nhds hn)
    filter_upwards [h_ev.filter_mono nhdsWithin_le_nhds] with t ht
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le ht.le, Set.indicator_of_mem (bot_le.trans_lt hn)]
  exact (h_eq.tendsto_iff.mpr (hX.stoppedProcess n ω t₀)).congr' h_eq.self_of_nhdsWithin.symm

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hτ_top
  rw [Function.RightContinuous] at *
  intro t
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 hτ_top) t
  specialize hn n le_rfl
  let τ := hX.localSeq n ω
  have h_lt : ⊥ < τ := (WithTop.coe_le_coe.2 bot_le).trans_lt hn
  have h_eq : (fun i ↦ X i ω) =ᶠ[𝓝[≥] t] (fun i ↦ stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω}.indicator (X i)) (hX.localSeq n) i ω) := by
    have h_mem : {i | (i : WithTop ι) < τ} ∈ 𝓝 t := by
      rcases τ with _ | b
      · exact univ_mem
      · exact Iio_mem_nhds (WithTop.coe_lt_coe.1 hn)
    exact eventuallyEq_nhdsWithin_iff.mpr (eventually_of_mem h_mem fun i hi ↦ by
      rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le hi.le, Set.indicator_of_mem h_lt])
  rw [h_eq, h_eq.eq_of_nhdsWithin le_rfl]
  exact hX.stoppedProcess n ω t

  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 hω) i

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω h_tendsto
  intro t
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ : ∃ n, (t : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq n ω :=
    ((WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 h_tendsto) t).exists
  have h_pos : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq n ω := (bot_le : (⊥ : WithTop ι) ≤ (t : WithTop ι)).trans_lt hn
  have h_eq : ∀ᶠ i in 𝓝[≥] t, stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω}.indicator (X i)) (hX.localSeq n) i ω = X i ω := by
    have : {i | (i : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq n ω} ∈ 𝓝 t :=
      WithTop.continuous_coe.continuousAt t (Iio_mem_nhds hn)
    filter_upwards [nhdsWithin_le_nhds this] with i hi
    simp only [stoppedProcess, min_eq_left hi.le, h_pos, Set.indicator_of_mem]
  exact (tendsto_congr' h_eq).mp (hX.stoppedProcess n ω t)

end cadlag

  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 hω i).exists
  have h_bot : ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω := (bot_le : ⊥ ≤ i).trans_lt hn
  have hn_eq (j : ι) (hj : (j : WithTop ι) ≤ hX.localSeq n ω) :
      stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω}.indicator (X i)) (hX.localSeq n) j ω = X j ω := by
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le hj, Set.indicator_of_mem h_bot]
  rw [← hn_eq i hn.le]
  apply (hX.stoppedProcess n ω i).congr'
  filter_upwards [mem_nhdsWithin_of_mem ((WithTop.isOpen_Iio (hX.localSeq n ω)).mem_nhds hn)] with j hj
  exact hn_eq j hj.le

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω i
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := ((WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 hω) i).exists
  refine (hX.stoppedProcess n ω i).congr_nhds ?_
  filter_upwards [(WithTop.continuous_coe.continuousAt i).eventually (isOpen_Iio.mem_nhds hn)] with j hj
  rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le hj.le, Set.indicator_of_mem (bot_le.trans_lt hn)]

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω t
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top.1 hω t).exists
  refine (hX.stoppedProcess n ω t).congr_of_eventuallyEq (EventuallyWithin.of_eventually ?_)
  filter_upwards [WithTop.continuous_coe.eventually_lt (continuous_const (b := hX.localSeq n ω)) hn] with i hi
  simp [stoppedProcess, hi.le, (WithTop.coe_le_coe.2 bot_le).trans_lt hi]

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  intro i
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 hω i).exists
  have h_lt : ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω := (WithTop.coe_le_coe.2 bot_le).trans_lt hn
  let S := {j | (j : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq n ω}
  have hS : IsOpen S := WithTop.continuous_coe.isOpen_preimage _ isOpen_Iio
  have h_eq j (hj : j ∈ S) : stoppedProcess (fun k ↦ {ω | ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω}.indicator (X k))
      (hX.localSeq n) j ω = X j ω := by
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le hj.le, Set.indicator_of_mem h_lt]
  exact (hX.stoppedProcess n ω i).congr_of_eventuallyEq
    (Eventually.filter_mono nhdsWithin_le_nhds (Eventually.of_mem (hS.mem_nhds hn) h_eq)) (h_eq i hn)

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω
  intro t
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 hω t
  specialize hn n le_rfl
  have h_lt : {t' | (t' : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq n ω} ∈ 𝓝 t := by
    cases hτ : hX.localSeq n ω with
    | top => simp
    | coe a => exact Iio_mem_nhds (WithTop.coe_lt_coe.1 (hτ ▸ hn))
  have h_eq : (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω' | ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω'}.indicator (X i)) (hX.localSeq n) · ω) =ᶠ[𝓝[≥] t] (X · ω) := by
    filter_upwards [nhdsWithin_le_nhds h_lt] with t' ht'
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le ht'.le, Set.indicator_of_mem (bot_le.trans_lt hn)]
  exact (hX.stoppedProcess n ω t).congr_of_eventuallyEq h_eq.symm h_eq.self_of_nhdsWithin.symm

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω h_tendsto
  intro t
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top.1 h_tendsto t).exists
  have h_lt : ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω := bot_le.trans_lt hn
  have h_eq : (X · ω) =ᶠ[𝓝[≥] t] (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω}.indicator (X i)) (hX.localSeq n) · ω) := by
    have : {s | ↑s < hX.localSeq n ω} ∈ 𝓝 t :=
      WithTop.continuous_coe.isOpen_preimage _ isOpen_Iio |>.mem_nhds hn
    filter_upwards [mem_nhdsWithin_of_mem_nhds this, self_mem_nhdsWithin] with s hs_lt hs_ge
    unfold stoppedProcess
    simp [hs_lt.le, h_lt]
  exact (hX.stoppedProcess n ω t).congr_of_eventuallyEq h_eq.symm
